content: [schema] Add new DB columns: net_revenue_split fields, table_split_promoter, table_split_basis, artist_cost_split_method, artist_venue_dollar, artist_venue_pct, artist_promoter_dollar
[types] Update types.ts: DEAL_STRUCTURES add Net revenue split, new DOOR/TABLE/ARTIST constants, EventFull new fields
[eventrecord] Rebuild EventRecordPage deal structure: net revenue split mode, door basis options, table section, artist cost structured split
[noa] Update NightOfActualsPage: artist cost auto-populate from event, net revenue split single payout line
[backend] Update routes.py Pydantic models and SQL queries to handle all new fields
